# Transcrição: 27-Custom Audience- Customer List 

- **Fonte:** 27-Custom Audience- Customer List 
- **Duração:** 01:43
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:43]

Now the next type of custom audience you can create is using a customer file. So this is covered a little bit within creating a lifetime value audience or creating a lifetime value custom audience, but here we can go over a couple more of the steps. So if you click on customer file you can either select use a file that includes a customer lifetime value or use a file that doesn't include a customer lifetime value and you can also download the templates for this within Facebook. So let's say we want to use one with the lifetime value here. So here is where you can download the file template you just click on here and it'll download for you. So we just uploaded our customer audience using lifetime value so you just need to select where you got this data originally as well. So Facebook has been cracking down a ton on where you're getting your specific customer data so you need to select this. So you can either select from customers and partners directly from customers or from partners. So you need to select whichever one applies for us it is directly from customers. So we click on that, you click on next and then what you need to do is you need to select which one the customer value is. So if you're creating a lifetime value here you want to make sure you create a column that is called lifetime value. So here we created a column called total lifetime value. So that's the total and then we'll go to next and then you're able to select here which data you want to use. So do you want to use the first name, the last name, email, address, city. All of these things are going to help Facebook find similar people to your customers on Facebook and then you just click on upload and create and it'll create that customer audience.
